sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 13:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 13:1
items.html: Because Keter is the phase of male of the MA and BON, which has phase two of clothing, while Hochma and Bina are the phase of female, which has only the coarseness of phase one. For this reason, the male has the level of Bina, which is the light of Ozen, as well as the phases of GAR from the beginning of its creation. Therefore, even its posterior was not canceled, whereas the female, which is HB, has only the level of phase one, which is ZA. Thus, she could not receive the level of GAR, and their posterior were canceled. (Inner Light, Item 23)
